description_long: This hardware store features a modern, boxy structure with a combination of light tan brick and large industrial-style windows. The front facade is marked by bold yellow and black hazard stripes on the garage-style entrance and a rooftop area, suggesting a utilitarian, industrial aesthetic. The building includes a covered outdoor area with seating, possibly for customers or displays, and a large, open garage door that likely serves as the main entrance for goods and customers. The roof is flat and partially sectioned, with visible HVAC units and a fenced-off area, indicating functional rooftop use. The rear and side facades are more austere, with minimal windows and a focus on solid brickwork. The overall design is practical, emphasizing accessibility and durability, suitable for a commercial hardware store in an urban environment.
description: A modern, boxy hardware store with tan brick walls, large industrial windows, and bold yellow-black hazard stripes on the garage entrance. Features include a covered outdoor area, flat roof with equipment, and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main garage entrance with yellow-black hazard stripes, a covered outdoor seating or display area, and large windows above.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a mostly solid brick wall with a few small windows and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain brick facade with no visible entrances, and a fenced rooftop area with equipment.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the large industrial windows, the covered outdoor area with tables and chairs, and the overall length of the building.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a large garage-style entrance with hazard stripes, a covered outdoor area with tables and chairs, and prominent industrial windows above. The entrance and outdoor area are clearly defined, with the rest of the facade being solid brick.
